dialogues.title: Narrator
dialogues.message: You have come far. The final pieces of your stolen skin lie ahead, but they are not left unguarded.

dialogues.title: Selkie
dialogues.message: I can feel it now. My skin is close… closer than it has ever been. I will not lose it again.

dialogues.title: Guide
dialogues.message: This path will test more than your movement. You will need to think before you act.

dialogues.title: Guide
dialogues.message: Some platforms will not move until you activate them. Look for triggers in the environment and interact with them to create a path forward.

dialogues.title: Guide
dialogues.message: Not every path is visible immediately. You may need to explore carefully to find the way ahead.

dialogues.title: Narrator
dialogues.message: A powerful presence guards what remains of your skin. It moves with intent, bound to protect what was taken from you.

dialogues.title: Guide
dialogues.message: The enemy does not follow a simple pattern. Its movement changes. Watch it closely before you move.

dialogues.title: Guide
dialogues.message: Do not rush forward. Plan your path, wait for the right moment, and move with purpose.

dialogues.title: Guide
dialogues.message: One mistake here will cost you. Falling or colliding with the enemy will return you to your last checkpoint.

dialogues.title: Guide
dialogues.message: Use checkpoints carefully. They are your only safeguard in this final stretch.

dialogues.title: Guide
dialogues.message: Collect the remaining fragments of your seal skin and reach the final platform.

dialogues.title: Selkie
dialogues.message: I have come too far to turn back now. I will reclaim what is mine.

dialogues.title: Narrator
dialogues.message: When the final fragment is restored, the selkie is no longer bound to the land. At last, she may return to the sea and become whole again.
